title: schizoglossum tenue
intro: Schizoglossum tenue, also known as the delicate Schizoglossum or the slender Schizoglossum, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schizoglossum tenue include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Schizoglossum tenue can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, allowing it to be easily incorporated into traditional herbal practices.
